{{Quote|Go on. I can hold 'em off from here. They picked a poor spot for an ambush.Get to the cloudjumper and deliver that antidote.|Lowghen Badra|<ref name="Jedi's Legacy">{{GamerCite|10|Jedi's Legacy}}</ref>}}
'''Lowghen Badra''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and friend of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Niquon]].

==Biography==
Badra worked as a technician at his shop, [[Badra's Engineering and Repair]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yabosta]]. One night while at work, Niquon's [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Nason Laric]], arrived with the remains of an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]].<ref name="Jedi's Legacy" />

Badra disassembled the droid and determined it made use of lethal [[Drethi/Legends|Drethi]] venom, and that Nason should return to [[Skalokor]] with the antidote. On their way, the pair was attacked by two groups of [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]]. Badra volunteered to hold them off, laying down a wall of counter-fire so Nason could reach his [[Cloudjumper]] and escape. Immediately after, an [[Yabosta Dark Jedi apprentice|apprentice]] of the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Von Totha]] appeared to eliminate the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Laric was able to defeat the overly-confident apprentice, allowing a limping Badra to approach the hangar and return with Laric to Yabosta.<ref name="Jedi's Legacy" />
